{{Quote|Heavy losses sustained in the ongoing assault of U'Dray have put us understrength.|Tomax Bren, in a datamemo to the Scimitar assault wing's squadron commanders|<ref name="IS2">[[Imperial Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''Imperial Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]</ref>}}
'''U'Dray''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|276|U'Dray}}</ref> situated in the [[U'Dray system/Legends|U'Dray system]] of the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]],<ref name="EAOC" /> a part of the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> As part of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War's]] [[Hook Nebula campaign]] waged at some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Qeimet fleet]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] carried out an [[Assault of U'Dray|assault]] at U'Dray.<ref name="IS2" /> The [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] initially achieved a rare victory over<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet's]] [[Scimitar assault wing]],<ref name="IS2" /> although the Empire nevertheless ultimately prevailed in the engagement.<ref name="TEA" />

The [[Assault Wing|assault wing's]] [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tomax Bren/Legends|Tomax Bren]], mentioned the ongoing assault of U'Dray in a [[datamemo]] sent to the [[Fighter wing/Legends|wing's]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] [[Commander/Legends|commanders]]. The message was subsequently included in a compilation of Imperial documents made by Rebel [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] for Alliance [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] and other Rebel [[Officer/Legends|officers]].<ref name="IS2" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Impsourcebook.jpg|thumb|right|220px|U'Dray's name was introduced in the ''Imperial Sourcebook''.]]
U'Dray's name was introduced via a mention of the assault of U'dray in [[Greg Gorden]]'s [[1989]] ''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]'' that was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="ISB">''[[Imperial Sourcebook]]''</ref> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' subsequently provided the first description of U'Dray as a planet.<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' then placed U'Dray in grid square O-18.<ref name="TEA" /> "[[Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are]]," a [[1990]] [[roleplaying game]] source article that was published in the [[Voyages SF 13|thirteenth issue]] of the ''[[Voyages SF]]'' magazine<ref name="Twinkle">{{VoyagesCite|13|Twinkle, Twinkle Little Star, How I Wonder Where We Are}}</ref> and was [[Canon|non-canonical]] with respect to the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] continuity,<ref name="Unlicensed">{{UnlicensedStatus}}</ref> placed U'Dray—the name of which it misspelled as "V'Dray" on one occasion—in the [[Byss sector]].<ref name="Twinkle" />
